options.title: API Token
options.description: Authenticate using email and API token

fields.name: api_token
fields.title: API Token
fields.description: Your Zendesk API token from Admin Center

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Zendesk Talk.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: UTC date and time in the format YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z from which to start replicating data.

custom_description:
Connector for the Zendesk Talk (Voice) API. Provides access to phone numbers,
addresses, greetings, IVR configurations, call data, and agent/account statistics
for Zendesk Talk voice support channels.
supported_questions:
- List all phone numbers in our Zendesk Talk account
- Show all addresses on file
- List all IVR configurations
- Show all greetings
- List greeting categories
- Show agent activity statistics
- Show the account overview stats
- Show current queue activity
- Which phone numbers have SMS enabled?
- Find agents who have missed the most calls today
- What is the average call duration across all calls?
- Which phone numbers are toll-free?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new phone number
- Delete an IVR configuration
- Update a greeting
- Make an outbound call

first_operation.description: Returns a list of all phone numbers in the Zendesk Talk account

schema.description: URL for the next page of results

phone_numbers.description: Returns a list of all phone numbers in the Zendesk Talk account

schema.description: URL for the next page of results

phone_numbers.description: Retrieves a single phone number by ID

addresses.description: Returns a list of all addresses in the Zendesk Talk account
Retrieves a single address by ID

greetings.description: Returns a list of all greetings in the Zendesk Talk account
Retrieves a single greeting by ID

greeting_categories.description: Returns a list of all greeting categories
Retrieves a single greeting category by ID

ivrs.description: Returns a list of all IVR configurations
Retrieves a single IVR configuration by ID

agents_activity.description: Returns activity statistics for all agents for the current day

agents_overview.description: Returns overview statistics for all agents for the current day

account_overview.description: Returns overview statistics for the account for the current day

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Unix epoch time to start from (e.g. 1704067200 for 2024-01-01)

calls.description: Returns incremental call data. Requires a start_time parameter (Unix epoch timestamp).

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Unix epoch time to start from (e.g. 1704067200 for 2024-01-01)

call_legs.description: Returns incremental call leg data. Requires a start_time parameter (Unix epoch timestamp).

fields.name: agent_state
fields.description: Agent state: online, offline, away, or transfers_only

fields.name: available_time
fields.description: Total time agent was available to answer calls

fields.name: away_time
fields.description: Total time agent was set to away

fields.name: call_status
fields.description: Agent call status: on_call, wrap_up, or null

fields.name: forwarding_number
fields.description: Forwarding number set by the agent

fields.name: total_hold_time
fields.description: Total hold time across all calls

fields.name: via
fields.description: Channel the agent is registered on

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether the greeting is associated with phone numbers

fields.name: audio_url
fields.description: Path to the greeting sound file

fields.name: default
fields.description: Whether this is a system default greeting

fields.name: default_lang
fields.description: Whether the greeting has a default language

fields.name: ivr_ids
fields.description: IDs of IVRs associated with the greeting

fields.name: phone_number_ids
fields.description: IDs of phone numbers associated with the greeting

fields.name: upload_id
fields.description: Upload ID associated with the greeting

fields.name: call_recording_consent
fields.description: What call recording consent is set to

fields.name: country_code
fields.description: ISO country code for the number

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Date and time the phone number was created

fields.name: external
fields.description: Whether this is an external caller ID number

fields.name: failover_number
fields.description: Failover number associated with the phone number

fields.name: greeting_ids
fields.description: Custom greeting IDs associated with the phone number

fields.name: ivr_id
fields.description: ID of IVR associated with the phone number

fields.name: name
fields.description: Nickname if set, otherwise the display number

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Priority level of the phone number

fields.name: schedule_id
fields.description: ID of schedule associated with the phone number

fields.name: token
fields.description: Generated token unique for the phone number

fields.name: exceeded_queue_wait_time
fields.description: Whether max queue wait time was exceeded

fields.name: outside_business_hours
fields.description: Whether call was outside business hours

fields.name: average_wait_time
fields.description: Average wait time for callers in queue (seconds)

fields.name: callbacks_waiting
fields.description: Number of callers in callback queue

fields.name: calls_waiting
fields.description: Number of callers waiting in queue

fields.name: embeddable_callbacks_waiting
fields.description: Number of Web Widget callback requests waiting

fields.name: longest_wait_time
fields.description: Longest wait time for any caller (seconds)

fields.name: total_calls_with_exceeded_queue_wait_time
fields.description: Total calls exceeding max queue wait time

fields.name: phone_number_ids
fields.description: IDs of phone numbers configured with this IVR

fields.name: phone_number_names
fields.description: Names of phone numbers configured with this IVR
